name: writing
description: Versioned draft management with structured feedback, character/POV tagging, and lore cross-referencing. Supports hierarchical structure (chapters containing scenes), immutable version history, and queryable revision feedback.
standalone_features: Create and manage hierarchical draft structures (chapters, scenes, fragments)
Immutable version history — every save is a new version, content is never lost
Structured feedback per draft: notes, revisions, critiques, suggestions, questions
Feedback status tracking: open, addressed, dismissed, deferred
Character/POV tagging per draft with role context (pov, featured, mentioned)
Project writing progress dashboard (word counts, status breakdown, feedback queue)
Full-text draft content preserved across all versions

features: Cross-reference drafts with creative_context entries (lore, canon, characters, relationships)
Link types: references, establishes, contradicts, extends
Lore coverage view — see which world-building entries are referenced vs orphaned
Feed approved drafts into writing_samples for mechanical baseline updates
enhancements.description: Drafts link to the creative identity module's lore/context layer, enabling lore coverage tracking and continuity verification.

features: Writing progress per project with word count and status breakdown
Milestone tracking tied to draft completion
enhancements.description: Writing drafts link to SoY projects, providing writing progress on project pages and dashboards.
Notes can be promoted to draft fragments. Research notes cross-reference with active drafts.
